extracted.title: TPGS Storage Conditions for 03/13/2026 -- INTRADAY
extracted.description:
Due to intraday nomination changes for Gas Day March 13, 2026, the following restrictions will be in place on the Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system for Gas Day March 13, 2026:

Tres Palacios has scheduled and sealed injections. No increases in injections will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
affectedLocations: Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system
